attributes.action: Stop Proposed Warehouse Development Opposite Residential Homes
attributes.additional_details: This type of building has happened recently in Henfold Estate in Tyldesley, Greater Manchester and the residents are trying to have this overturned and removed.    We would like support to halt this process before it goes ahead which is due very soon.
attributes.background: Test Valley Council have agreed build 4 18m high Warehouses directly opposite a village in Picket Piece Andover. The development will significantly increase heavy goods vehicle HGV traffic, creating congestion, noise, and serious safety risks for families, children, cyclists, and pedestrians.

rejection.details:
We can’t accept petitions that call for action at a local level.

You could ask your MP to take action on your concerns about this issue.

You can find contact details for your local MP here: https://members.parliament.uk/FindYourMP

You could also raise your issue with a local councillor who represents you. You can use this page to find out who your local councillors are, and how to contact them: https://www.gov.uk/find-your-local-councillors
